# ClassUp

> ClassUp is an Australian NAPLAN preparation platform for children in Years 3 to 9. It gives families a free diagnostic, an honest parent report, and adaptive practice across Numeracy, Reading, and Language Conventions. Tagline: "NAPLAN prep that tells you the truth."

## Key pages
- [Year 5 NAPLAN hub](https://classup.com.au/naplan-year-5): what Year 5 NAPLAN tests and how to prepare honestly
- [Year 7 NAPLAN hub](https://classup.com.au/naplan-year-7): the first NAPLAN of high school and how to prepare
- [Year 5 Numeracy](https://classup.com.au/naplan-year-5-numeracy): what Year 5 NAPLAN numeracy tests
- [Year 7 Numeracy](https://classup.com.au/naplan-year-7-numeracy): what Year 7 NAPLAN numeracy tests
- [Year 5 Reading](https://classup.com.au/naplan-year-5-reading): what Year 5 NAPLAN reading tests
- [Year 7 Reading](https://classup.com.au/naplan-year-7-reading): what Year 7 NAPLAN reading tests
- [NAPLAN Proficiency Levels](https://classup.com.au/naplan/proficiency-levels-explained): what Exceeding, Strong, Developing and Needs additional support mean
- [How to read NAPLAN results](https://classup.com.au/blog/how-to-read-naplan-results): a parent's guide to the results report
- [How It Works](https://classup.com.au/how-it-works) · [Methodology](https://classup.com.au/methodology) · [Pricing](https://classup.com.au/pricing): $59/month first child, $49 each additional, GST included

## About
- Australian English throughout. NAPLAN is the National Assessment Program – Literacy and Numeracy, sat in Years 3, 5, 7 and 9 each March.
- ClassUp reports real progress and real struggles; it makes no score or band promises.
